subcodes.first_line: O Ali! The Most Exalted Pen hath testified in thy behalf with that which all the ornaments and treasures of the earth cannot equal, nor the seas thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی شهد القلم الاعلی فی حقک بما لاتعادله زخارف الارض و کنوزها و لا البحار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
